comment: Docs for the query-metachar integration test (query-sanitization brief, W2). The 'target' doc holds the fact a natural-language question with metacharacters must retrieve.

docs.content: The SIAC_GEE tool implements the 6S atmospheric correction algorithm; MAJA and Sen2Cor are alternatives.
Grocery list: oat milk, coffee beans, rye bread.
Cycling route notes from the weekend ride around the lake.
